programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Paul travels on the stunning Glacier Express and drives a funicular train to the Reichenbach Falls, where Sherlock Holmes met his fictional demise.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: The comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West returns. Maggie and Eddie haven't spoken for a year, until they're reunited as bridesmaids at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. Maggie and Whitney lock horns over Eddie's affection as they go on an odyssey across London to secure tickets to a drag show.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Britain's Got Talent, The Dog House, The Apprentice, Secret Garden and the news on the Artemis II moon mission.

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The drone police join the search for a woman who left a suicide note and vanished. Officers track a dodgy dog-breeding gang to a horrific hovel. And a wrongdoer's hiding up a tree.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In East Anglia, a seriously ill dialysis patient desperately needs fluids. And on Canvey Island, the medics take over the breathing of a motorcyclist who's bleeding from his ear.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the new series giving extraordinary people a chance to perform the one song that tells their story. In Liverpool, a teen sings Bocelli for his foster mum.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Andi and Neil dream of retiring to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect place close to the coastal town of Mazarrón, near Murcia, for £145,000.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George squeezes into an Edwardian workers cottage that's only half the size of a squash court, and visits a house with overwhelmingly Italian décor.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam unwittingly breaks his cardinal rule never to date a married woman and finds himself on the spot when her husband appears.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach falls madly in love with a woman named Irene, who agrees to marry him. True to form, Sam takes a romantic interest in Irene's daughter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Irene has won two million dollars on the lottery and called off the wedding, but Coach remains convinced that she'll come back to him on their big day.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: All Ray wants for Christmas is a little loving from his wife, but they can't get any privacy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray volunteers for a Battle of Gettysburg re-enactment to spend some quality time with his father - but it turns out that they're fighting on opposite sides.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's oldest living relative, his great aunt Sarina, turns up from Italy to help Ally with a school project about family trees.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are pitted against the owner of a local garage in a war over principles and two dollars. Daphne leaves the Crane household for the last time.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's attempts to become condominium president take a new turn when he persuades Martin to run as a 'puppet' candidate.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz's 20-year-old cousin (guest star Zooey Deschanel) is quite the party girl. When she arrives in Seattle, Frasier finds it impossible to keep up with her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier plots revenge on Bulldog after he finds himself on the receiving end of an office prank.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion to the Mill Street Bistro saga, Gordon's disagreement with the proprietor erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Staffordshire to meet petrolhead Martin, who's also the organiser of a local music festival.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In Alnwick, the Bakers immerse themselves in castle life, take on extreme gardening and visit the shop where the 'Keep Calm and Carry On' poster was discovered.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Jan and Chris look for a dream holiday home in Almería, Spain. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for £150k that works for both of their families.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where
programme.desc: In Italy, will Kevin and Laura finish their renovations before guests arrive? And can Vicky and Aurelian rise to the challenge as they open a bakery in France.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie's apartment gets their hearts racing as their Valentine's event approaches. Mark and Sandra juggle a gîte renovation and tractor lessons.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: It's the final push, as the family's big summer bash is almost upon them. With guests about to arrive, can they gather momentum and complete everything in time.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Japanese prisons have become retirement homes for a rising number of elderly convicts. Krishnan Guru-Murthy investigates the country's geriatric crime wave.

programme.title: Cadbury vs McVitie's: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: In the ultimate sweet-snack slugfest, from dunking to gifting to shrinking chocs, a look at how these landmark brands are battling to be Britain's top treat.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hair stylist meets a nutritionist with a bit of 'swag'. A conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher who also wrestles. And an opera singer serenades his date.

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans returns to Channel 4 with his iconic show, but this time he's unplugged! Tonight: Sam Ryder, Peter Capaldi, Gemma Arterton and more join Chris for unfiltered conversation.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
programme.desc: Eva Green and Asa Butterfield star in Tim Burton's fantasy adventure. A teenager enters the magical, but scary and violent, world where his grandfather grew up.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jennifer McGirr hosts at Tower View Hotel in Blackpool, where there are unwanted guests in a bathroom and trouble at breakfast time when some of Jennifer's guests try to order off-menu.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Daniel welcomes his rivals to Church Spa in East Markham, Nottinghamshire. Some of his guests are impressed by the spa facilities, while others are less smitten with the price tag.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Lisa host at the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex. Their guests get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone has a solid night's sleep.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former GMTV presenter Matt Arnold hosts at the Bridge Hotel in Brandon, Suffolk, where he hopes his 'blissful beds, beautiful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' will impress his guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time, to confront their rivals and discover how much they've been paid. Things get heated when it's time to count up the cash.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She makes a fun garland from paper, a beautiful spring wreath, and a string-art hot air balloon.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Carrie and Arthur's bickering spirals out of control, Doug and Carrie decide it's time to send Arthur to a psychotherapist to find the root of his anger.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Carrie has to work the night shift, Doug gets lonely, until he discovers that Arthur is the ideal companion.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie don't make a good first impression on their new neighbours when they have a particularly loud argument.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie start to believe in miracles after Carrie's prayers are answered. Meanwhile, Arthur decides to sell Doug and Carrie's house.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray asks Marie to teach Debra how to make her famous meatballs, to cure his wife's culinary inferiority complex. But Ray's plan has unexpected consequences..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray runs into money trouble when he takes over the family finances to show Debra how easy it is.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is bored when he goes for a ride in Robert's police car, but his disinterest is soon replaced by terror when they get caught in a hold-up.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier makes a deal with his Trekkie workmate Noel that he'll get him Scott Bakula's autograph if Noel teaches him Hebrew. But all does not go to plan.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bristle While You Work (Part 1/3): Frasier hires a housekeeper to replace Daphne, but she proves less than reliable. Niles fears his toothache may be a sign of something serious.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Rooms with a View (Part 2/3): The Cranes pay an unexpected visit to the hospital as Niles prepares to undergo heart bypass surgery.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Flanders loses his cool when his laid-back parents start to prefer Homer's company to his own. Lisa is bullied by her new substitute teacher (Tina Fey).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart's accused of playing a prank on the school marching band - a prank he says he didn't commit - Lisa must step in to defend her brother in court.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trendy new reverend recruits Homer as a deacon. Dry cleaners accidentally swap Marge's wedding dress for one of Krusty's clown costumes.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Cedarwood Holidays in Cornwall, where Kirstie and Joe's pristine glamping pods and a chance to feed seals go down a treat. Will things stay flawless at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers are still in Cornwall for the week's second visit, at The Llawnroc Hotel, where former Redcoats Craig and Rachel are banking on being able to keep their guests entertained.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's a hat-trick! The B&Bers spend a third consecutive visit in Cornwall, at ex-military man Jo's The Olde Malthouse, where he's hoping to wow his guests with his B&B's heritage charm.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Dorset for the week's final visit, at The Britannia Inn, run by Hannah and Lee. The controversial pricing at breakfast leaves one guest with a sour taste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and time to find out who's won. It's been a week of vitriol, with lots of B&Bers choosing not to return to the others' establishments. Will it all kick off? Probably.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Alistair and Candice, whose budget and expectations didn't quite match in Swindon. And did Thomas and Angelina's green fingers ever come to be in Bolton.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: We catch up with Carol and Andrew, who were divided over their Harrogate home. Did they create the space they needed, or did any of Yorkshire's gems catch their eye.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the new series giving extraordinary people a chance to perform the one song that tells their story. In Liverpool, a teen sings Bocelli for his foster mum.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little make vegan fruit tarts and recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Lucy Shepherd and a team of nomadic Indigenous hunter-gatherers set off on foot across Tanzania and through one of Africa's last great wildernesses.
